data.title: Mitsui Acquires Full Ownership of ITC Rubis to Boost European Operations
data.description:
Mitsui & Co ( (JP:8031) ) has provided an announcement.

Mitsui & Co., Ltd. has acquired the remaining 50% of shares in ITC Rubis Terminal Antwerp NV, making it a wholly owned subsidiary. This acquisition will allow Mitsui to double its earnings from ITC Rubis and accelerate the expansion of its tank terminal operations in Antwerp, a key chemical logistics hub in Europe.

More about Mitsui & Co

Mitsui & Co., Ltd. is a diversified Japanese company involved in various industries, including chemicals, energy, and logistics. The company focuses on expanding its global operations and enhancing its market presence through strategic acquisitions and partnerships.

data.title: Po Valley Energy Updates Investors on Resource Estimates and Exploration Focus
data.description:
Po Valley Energy Limited ( (AU:PVE) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Po Valley Energy Limited has released an investor update detailing its current activities and resource estimates. The company provides additional information on its reserves and resources, emphasizing that these estimates are based on reports from 2022 and have been adjusted for production depletion. The update highlights the company’s continued focus on exploration and development to potentially recover undiscovered petroleum resources, which could impact its operational capabilities and market positioning.

More about Po Valley Energy Limited

Po Valley Energy Limited is a European gas producer listed on the ASX under the ticker PVE. The company focuses on the exploration and production of oil and gas resources, with a market focus on European energy markets.

data.title: HSBC Executes Major Share Buy-Back to Boost Shareholder Value
data.description:
HSBC Holdings ( (GB:HSBA) ) has shared an announcement.

HSBC Holdings plc announced a significant buy-back of its ordinary shares, purchasing a total of 3,532,345 shares on 2 April 2025 across UK and Hong Kong venues. This move is part of a larger buy-back program initiated on 20 February 2025, through which the company has repurchased over 143 million shares for approximately US$1.63 billion. The buy-back is expected to enhance shareholder value by reducing the number of shares in circulation, thereby increasing earnings per share. The cancellation of shares repurchased on the UK venues has been completed, while those on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange are pending, with further announcements to follow.

More about HSBC Holdings

HSBC Holdings plc is a leading global financial services company headquartered in London, United Kingdom. It operates in the banking and financial services industry, offering a wide range of services including personal, commercial, and investment banking, as well as wealth management. HSBC has a significant market presence in Asia, Europe, and the Americas.

YTD Price Performance: 11.70%

Average Trading Volume: 27,651,957

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £155.1B

data.title: MotorCycle Holdings Appoints Nikki Thomas as Independent Non-Executive Director
data.description:
Motorcycle Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:MTO) ) has shared an announcement.

MotorCycle Holdings Limited, a company listed on the Australian Securities Exchange, has announced the appointment of Ms. Nikki Thomas as an Independent Non-Executive Director, effective April 3, 2025. Ms. Thomas, who will also chair the Audit & Risk Committee, brings over 30 years of experience in the financial services industry, with a strong background in global equities portfolio management. Her expertise is expected to enhance the board’s skill set and contribute to the company’s strategic direction.

More about Motorcycle Holdings Ltd.

data.title: Gold Mountain Limited Requests Trading Halt Pending Key Announcement
data.description:
The latest update is out from Gold Mountain Limited ( (AU:GMN) ).

Gold Mountain Limited has requested a trading halt on its securities pending an announcement about the institutional component of its accelerated entitlement offer. This halt is expected to last until the start of trading on April 7, 2025. The outcome of this offer could impact the company’s financial positioning and stakeholder interests, reflecting its strategic moves in the mineral exploration sector.

More about Gold Mountain Limited

Gold Mountain Limited (ASX: GMN) is a mineral exploration company focused on rare earth elements (REE) with projects in Brazil and Papua New Guinea (PNG). The company explores a diverse range of tenements for lithium, nickel, copper, and gold, with significant assets in REE and niobium. Its portfolio includes REE-niobium licenses in Bahia and Minas Gerais, lithium projects in the eastern Brazilian lithium belt, and copper projects in northeast Brazil. In PNG, the Green River Project is a key focus, showing promise with high-grade Cu-Au and Pb-Zn samples.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$9.16M

For detailed information about GMN stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Borgosesia Reports Steady Q1 Sales and CFO Departure
data.description:
Borgosesia S.p.A. ( (IT:BO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Borgosesia S.p.A. reported real estate sales of 6.2 million euros in the first quarter of 2025, consistent with the previous year. The company also announced the termination of its CFO, Dr. Alessandro Maestranzi, with a settlement agreement, indicating a strategic personnel change without affecting share ownership.

More about Borgosesia S.p.A.

Borgosesia S.p.A., listed on Euronext Milan, specializes in alternative asset management, focusing on real estate and financial engineering in special situations like corporate crises and generational transitions. The company operates through two divisions: Borgosesia Real Estate and Borgosesia Alternative.

data.title: Prosper Gold Secures $525,000 for Cyprus Project Exploration
data.description:
Prosper Gold ( (TSE:PGX) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Prosper Gold Corp. has successfully closed a non-brokered private placement, raising $525,000 through the issuance of 5,250,000 flow-through shares. The proceeds from this financing will be directed towards exploration activities at the company’s Cyprus Project, enhancing its operational capabilities and potentially strengthening its position in the mining sector.

More about Prosper Gold

Prosper Gold Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on exploration activities. The company is engaged in the development of mineral projects, with a particular emphasis on its Cyprus Project.

data.title: Bain Capital Entities Cease Substantial Holding in Tower Limited
data.description:
Tower Limited ( (AU:TWR) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bain Capital Credit LP, Bain Capital Investments (Europe) Limited, and Dent Issuer Designated Activity Company have ceased to hold a substantial interest in Tower Limited, a company listed on the NZX. Previously holding 19.941% of Tower Limited’s ordinary shares, these entities now hold 0% following a block trade agreement executed on March 31, 2025, with Forsyth Barr Limited and Goldman Sachs New Zealand Limited. This transaction involved the sale of 68,306,802 shares at a fixed price of NZ$1.30 per share, totaling NZ$88,798,842.60, with settlement completed on April 3, 2025.
